title: Staying Safe and Smart with AI
subtitle: What you need to know to protect yourself
description: In 4 lessons, you'll learn what actually happens to the stuff you type into AI tools, how to spot AI-generated fakes and scams, when NOT to trust AI for important decisions, and how to have the AI safety conversation with your family. No paranoia — just practical knowledge that actually matters.

lessons.title: What Happens to the Stuff You Type
lessons.subtitle: Where your words go — and what you should never share

lessons.title: Spotting AI Fakes
lessons.subtitle: Deepfakes, scam calls, and how to tell what's real

lessons.title: When NOT to Trust AI
lessons.subtitle: The line between helpful starting point and dangerous final answer

lessons.title: Teaching Your Family About AI
lessons.subtitle: How to be the AI-smart person everyone turns to
